product_name: Tretinoin Tretin 0.025% Cream USP 30g
product_description: Tretin 0.025% Cream Uses, Benefits, Price Tretinoin 0.025% topical cream is a powerful medication designed to treat acne, significantly reducing the number and severity of pimples while promoting rapid healing of those that do appear. As a member of the retinoid class of medications, Tretinoin works by influencing the growth of skin cells, making it a reliable solution for acne sufferers.   Retino-A (Tretinoin) is applied topically to the face. Patients should ask their doctor if they are unsure of the proper application procedure. You must ensure that your hands, as well as the area of skin requiring treatment are clean before you apply the cream. Use a gentle cleanser to wash your face, and gently dry it. Your doctor may tell you to apply it once per day, just before you go to bed. In some cases, 8 to 12 weeks of applying this cream may be required in order for the full benefits to be noticed. Acne may appear to worsen at the start of treatment, however, with continued treatment it should improve. Keep using the cream as directed by your doctor.   Tretinoin 0.025% Cream is a form of vitamin A. It is used for the treatment of acne, a common skin condition that occurs when the pores of your skin become clogged causing blackheads, whiteheads, or pimples. It also reduces the wrinkles on your face. It works by reducing oil production in the skin and replenishing acne-prone skin.   Tretinoin 0.025% Cream rarely shows side effects. However, in some cases, it may cause peeling of the skin, burning sensation, irritation, itching, or redness at the site of application. Consult your doctor if any of these side effects do not resolve with time or worsen.   Tretinoin 0.025% Cream should be used as prescribed by your doctor. Clean and dry the acne-prone skin area and apply a thin layer of this medicine. Wash your hands before and after applying this medicine. Use this medicine at night for better results. Avoid contact with your eyes, nose, mouth, or broken skin. Rinse thoroughly with water in case of accidental contact.   Country of origin India   Arogga offers Retino-A (Tretinoin) 0.025% Cream, a topical treatment for acne and visible signs of aging. This effective formula is a form of vitamin A that tackles acne at its source and promotes a smoother, younger-looking complexion.   BENEFITS OF TRETIN CREAM   In Treatment of Acne Tretin 0.025% Cream is a form of vitamin A. It helps treat acne by clearing skin pores and preventing spots or pimples from appearing. It usually takes several weeks to have a noticeable effect so keep using it even if it appears not to be working. Sometimes acne may get worse before it gets better, however, with proper use, your skin will get clearer. The earlier you start using it, the less likely you are to get scars. This medicine will help improve your mood and uplift your confidence as your skin becomes acne-free. It should not be used if you have eczema or sunburned skin.   SIDE EFFECTS OF TRETIN CREAM Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them   Common side effects of Tretin Erythema (skin redness) Skin irritation Dry skin Dry lips Pale red skin Increased sensitivity to light   How to Use Tretinoin 0.025% Topical Cream   Preparation and Application Instructions   Read the Patient Information Leaflet: Before starting this medication and each time you get a refill, thoroughly read the Patient Information Leaflet provided by your pharmacist. This leaflet contains essential information on how to use Tretinoin correctly and safely. Consult Healthcare Professionals: If you have any questions or concerns, consult your doctor or pharmacist to ensure you understand how to use this medication effectively.   Step-by-Step Application Process   Wash Your Hands: Begin by washing your hands thoroughly to remove any dirt or bacteria. Cleanse the Affected Area: Gently clean the affected skin with a mild or soapless cleanser, then pat it dry with a soft towel. Avoid using harsh soaps or exfoliants as they can irritate the skin. Apply the Medication: Use your fingertips to apply a small amount of the cream (approximately the size of a pea) in a thin layer as directed by your doctor. Typically, Tretinoin is applied once daily at bedtime. For liquid formulations, a gauze pad or cotton swab can be used to apply the medication. Wait Before Application: For some preparations, it’s recommended to wait 20 to 30 minutes after cleansing your face before applying the medication. This ensures your skin is completely dry, reducing the risk of irritation. Avoid Sensitive Areas: Do not apply Tretinoin to the inner lip area, inside the nose or mouth, or on skin that is cut, scraped, sunburned, or affected by eczema.   Precautions   Eye Contact: Avoid getting the medication in your eyes. If accidental contact occurs, flush your eyes with large amounts of water. Contact your doctor if eye irritation develops. Post-Application Handwashing: Wash your hands after applying the medication to prevent accidentally transferring it to your eyes or other sensitive areas.   Understanding Tretinoin’s Effects   Initial Reactions: During the first few weeks of using Tretinoin, your acne might initially appear worse. This reaction is normal as the medication works on pimples forming beneath the skin’s surface. Patience is key, as it may take 8 to 12 weeks to see noticeable improvements.   Consistency is Crucial   Regular Use: For optimal results, use Tretinoin consistently. Applying it at the same time each day can help you remember. Dosage: Do not use a larger amount or apply it more frequently than prescribed. Overuse will not accelerate improvement and may increase the risk of redness, peeling, and discomfort.   Choosing the Right Form and Strength   Different Forms Available: Tretinoin is available in various forms and strengths, including gels, creams, and solutions. Your doctor will recommend the best type based on your skin condition and response to treatment.   Monitoring Progress: Report to Your Doctor: Keep your doctor informed about your progress. If your condition persists or worsens, additional consultation may be necessary to adjust your treatment plan.   Maximizing the Benefits of Tretinoin   Skin Care Routine: Incorporate Tretinoin into a broader skincare routine for the best results. Use gentle, non-comedogenic products to avoid irritating your skin further. Moisturizers can help manage dryness and peeling that may occur with Tretinoin use.   Sun Protection   Sunscreen Use: Tretinoin can make your skin more sensitive to sunlight. Apply a broad-spectrum sunscreen with an SPF of at least 30 daily, even on cloudy days. Protective Clothing: Wearing hats and protective clothing can further shield your skin from harmful UV rays.   Lifestyle Factors   Healthy Diet: A balanced diet rich in vitamins and minerals supports overall skin health. Foods high in antioxidants can help reduce inflammation and promote healing. Hydration: Drinking plenty of water keeps your skin hydrated and helps flush out toxins. Avoid Touching Your Face: Minimize touching your face to prevent transferring oils and bacteria that can exacerbate acne.   Common Questions About Tretinoin   How long does it take to see results with Tretinoin? Results can vary, but it typically takes 8 to 12 weeks of consistent use to notice significant improvements in your skin.   Can I use Tretinoin with other acne treatments? Consult your doctor before combining Tretinoin with other acne treatments. Some combinations may cause increased irritation or reduce effectiveness.   What should I do if I experience severe irritation? If you experience severe irritation, redness, or peeling, contact your doctor. They may adjust your dosage or recommend a different treatment approach.   Is it safe to use Tretinoin during pregnancy? Tretinoin is generally not recommended during pregnancy. Discuss alternative acne treatments with your doctor if you are pregnant or planning to become pregnant.   Can I wear makeup while using Tretinoin? Yes, you can wear makeup, but choose non-comedogenic products that won’t clog your pores. Ensure your skin is clean before applying Tretinoin at bedtime.   How should I store Tretinoin?   Store Tretinoin at room temperature, away from light and moisture. Keep it out of reach of children and pets.   Tretinoin 0.025% topical cream is a proven and effective treatment for acne, offering significant benefits in reducing and healing pimples. By following the proper application instructions and maintaining a consistent skincare routine, you can achieve clearer, healthier skin. Always consult your healthcare provider with any concerns or questions to ensure the best results from your treatment.

product_name: Clobesco-GM Cream 20gm
product_description: INTRODUCTION ABOUT CLOBEGO GM CREAM CLOBEGO GM CREAM is a combination of Clobetasol, Miconazole and Neomycin which belongs to the group of medicines called Corticosteroids, Antifungals and Antibiotics. It is used to manage resistant dermatoses (skin infections) with secondary bacterial or fungal infection. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in patients with rosacea, acne vulgaris, perioral dermatitis, perianal and genital pruritus, viral infections (ex. herpes simplex, chickenpox) and perforated eardrum. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with liver or kidney disease. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is generally not recommended for use in pregnancy unless considered clearly necessary. CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in breastfeeding women as it is not known whether it may pass through the breast milk. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in children under 2 years of age. Contact your doctor before applying. Dosage adjustment is not required for CLOBEGO GM CREAM in the geriatric population. However, greater sensitivity of some older individuals cannot be ruled out. Contact your doctor before applying. The most common side effects of this medicine are skin rash, itching, redness, burning sensation and contact dermatitis. Contact your physician if any of the symptoms worsen.   USES OF CLOBEGO GM CREAM Used to manage resistant dermatoses (skin infections) with secondary bacterial or fungal infection   HOW CLOBEGO GM CREAM WORKS CLOBEGO GM CREAM helps to manage infection, where Clobetasol have anti-inflammatory, antipruritic, and vasoconstrictive properties, which blocks the production of certain chemical messengers (prostaglandins) that make the skin red, swollen, and itchy. Miconazole belongs to antifungal which stops the growth of fungi while Neomycin belongs to antibiotic which stops the growth of bacteria in the skin.   DIRECTIONS FOR USE Apply CLOBEGO GM CREAM as directed by your physician. It is for external use only. Wash your hands with soap and water and apply a thin layer of the medicine to the affected area of the skin and rub it gently. Avoid contact with eyes, face, groin or in the skin folds.   SIDE EFFECTS OF CLOBEGO GM CREAM COMMON skin rash, itching, redness burning sensation contact dermatitis   RARE Stop applying CLOBEGO GM CREAM and contact your physician immediately if you experience any of the following side effects: severe allergic reactions such as anaphylaxis or angioedema (skin rash, swelling of the face, lips, tongue, or throat causing breathing difficulty)     HOW TO MANAGE SIDE EFFECTS Skin Rash Or Itching Avoid hot showers because hot water can irritate the skin. Do not scratch the affected area. Use sunscreen and protective clothing when outdoors. Regularly use unscented moisturizers to soothe and hydrate the affected area. Contact your doctor if itching worsens.   WARNING & PRECAUTIONS PREGNANCY Monitoring required CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in pregnancy unless considered clearly necessary. Contact your doctor before applying. BREASTFEEDING Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in breastfeeding women as it is not known whether it may pass through the breast milk. Contact your doctor before applying. KIDNEY Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with kidney disease. Contact your doctor before applying. LIVER Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with liver disease. Contact your doctor before applying. ALLERGY Contraindicated Do not use CLOBEGO GM CREAM if you are allergic to Clobetasol, Miconazole, Neomycin, or to any other ingredients of this medicine. USE IN PEDIATRICS Contraindicated CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in children under 2 years of age. Contact your doctor before applying. USE IN GERIATRICS Use with Caution Dosage adjustment is not required for CLOBEGO GM CREAM in the geriatric population. However, greater sensitivity of some older individuals cannot be ruled out. Contact your doctor before applying. OTHERS CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use if you have: rosacea acne vulgaris perioral dermatitis perianal and genital pruritus viral infections (ex. herpes simplex, chickenpox) perforated eardrum     INTERACTIONS A. Drug-Drug interactions: Before applying CLOBEGO GM CREAM tell your doctor if you are taking, ritonavir (medicines used for HIV infections) itraconazole (medicines used for fungal infections) amikacin, gentamicin (medicines used for bacterial infections) neuromuscular blocking agents like atracurium, pancuronium (medicines used in anaesthesia) warfarin (medicines used to manage or manage blood clots) Overdosage: If you or anyone else accidentally uses too much of CLOBEGO GM CREAM, consult your doctor immediately or visit the nearby hospital.   SYNOPSIS Drug :   Clobetasol, Miconazole, Neomycin Pharmacological Category :   Corticosteroids, Antifungals, Antibiotics Therapeutic Indication :   Skin infections Dosage Forms :   Cream, Lotion, Ointment   MORE INFORMATION Keep out of reach of children Store CLOBEGO GM CREAM below 25°C

product_name: Clobesco-GM Cream 10gm
product_description: INTRODUCTION ABOUT CLOBEGO GM CREAM CLOBEGO GM CREAM is a combination of Clobetasol, Miconazole and Neomycin which belongs to the group of medicines called Corticosteroids, Antifungals and Antibiotics. It is used to manage resistant dermatoses (skin infections) with secondary bacterial or fungal infection. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in patients with rosacea, acne vulgaris, perioral dermatitis, perianal and genital pruritus, viral infections (ex. herpes simplex, chickenpox) and perforated eardrum. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with liver or kidney disease. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is generally not recommended for use in pregnancy unless considered clearly necessary. CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in breastfeeding women as it is not known whether it may pass through the breast milk. Contact your doctor before applying. CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in children under 2 years of age. Contact your doctor before applying. Dosage adjustment is not required for CLOBEGO GM CREAM in the geriatric population. However, greater sensitivity of some older individuals cannot be ruled out. Contact your doctor before applying. The most common side effects of this medicine are skin rash, itching, redness, burning sensation and contact dermatitis. Contact your physician if any of the symptoms worsen.   USES OF CLOBEGO GM CREAM Used to manage resistant dermatoses (skin infections) with secondary bacterial or fungal infection   HOW CLOBEGO GM CREAM WORKS CLOBEGO GM CREAM helps to manage infection, where Clobetasol have anti-inflammatory, antipruritic, and vasoconstrictive properties, which blocks the production of certain chemical messengers (prostaglandins) that make the skin red, swollen, and itchy. Miconazole belongs to antifungal which stops the growth of fungi while Neomycin belongs to antibiotic which stops the growth of bacteria in the skin.   DIRECTIONS FOR USE Apply CLOBEGO GM CREAM as directed by your physician. It is for external use only. Wash your hands with soap and water and apply a thin layer of the medicine to the affected area of the skin and rub it gently. Avoid contact with eyes, face, groin or in the skin folds.   SIDE EFFECTS OF CLOBEGO GM CREAM COMMON skin rash, itching, redness burning sensation contact dermatitis   RARE Stop applying CLOBEGO GM CREAM and contact your physician immediately if you experience any of the following side effects: severe allergic reactions such as anaphylaxis or angioedema (skin rash, swelling of the face, lips, tongue, or throat causing breathing difficulty)     HOW TO MANAGE SIDE EFFECTS Skin Rash Or Itching Avoid hot showers because hot water can irritate the skin. Do not scratch the affected area. Use sunscreen and protective clothing when outdoors. Regularly use unscented moisturizers to soothe and hydrate the affected area. Contact your doctor if itching worsens.   WARNING & PRECAUTIONS PREGNANCY Monitoring required CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in pregnancy unless considered clearly necessary. Contact your doctor before applying. BREASTFEEDING Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in breastfeeding women as it is not known whether it may pass through the breast milk. Contact your doctor before applying. KIDNEY Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with kidney disease. Contact your doctor before applying. LIVER Use with Caution CLOBEGO GM CREAM should be used with caution in patients with liver disease. Contact your doctor before applying. ALLERGY Contraindicated Do not use CLOBEGO GM CREAM if you are allergic to Clobetasol, Miconazole, Neomycin, or to any other ingredients of this medicine. USE IN PEDIATRICS Contraindicated CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use in children under 2 years of age. Contact your doctor before applying. USE IN GERIATRICS Use with Caution Dosage adjustment is not required for CLOBEGO GM CREAM in the geriatric population. However, greater sensitivity of some older individuals cannot be ruled out. Contact your doctor before applying. OTHERS CLOBEGO GM CREAM is not recommended for use if you have: rosacea acne vulgaris perioral dermatitis perianal and genital pruritus viral infections (ex. herpes simplex, chickenpox) perforated eardrum     INTERACTIONS A. Drug-Drug interactions: Before applying CLOBEGO GM CREAM tell your doctor if you are taking, ritonavir (medicines used for HIV infections) itraconazole (medicines used for fungal infections) amikacin, gentamicin (medicines used for bacterial infections) neuromuscular blocking agents like atracurium, pancuronium (medicines used in anaesthesia) warfarin (medicines used to manage or manage blood clots) Overdosage: If you or anyone else accidentally uses too much of CLOBEGO GM CREAM, consult your doctor immediately or visit the nearby hospital.   SYNOPSIS Drug :   Clobetasol, Miconazole, Neomycin Pharmacological Category :   Corticosteroids, Antifungals, Antibiotics Therapeutic Indication :   Skin infections Dosage Forms :   Cream, Lotion, Ointment   MORE INFORMATION Keep out of reach of children Store CLOBEGO GM CREAM below 25°C

product_name: Glyco-12 Cream 30gm
product_description: Buy Glyco 6 Cream 30gm Cream in Bangladesh   Glyco 6 Cream is a highly effective skincare solution known for its potent 6% glycolic acid formulation. This cream is designed to tackle a variety of skin concerns, including acne, hyperpigmentation, melasma, and photoaging. It offers ultra-hydrating benefits while being non-irritating, making it suitable for different skin types, including sensitive skin. With its skin-renewing properties, Glyco 6 Cream increases skin cell turnover, thereby reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.   Key Features   Ultra-Hydrating and Non-Irritating: Glyco 6 Cream ensures deep hydration without irritating, making it ideal for regular use, even on sensitive skin. Skin Renewal: The cream accelerates skin cell turnover, crucial for treating acne scars, hyperpigmentation, and photoaging. Anti-aging Benefits: Reduces the visibility of fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a smoother, more youthful appearance. 6% Glycolic Acid Formulation: This concentration of glycolic acid is effective yet gentle enough for regular use, offering noticeable improvements in skin texture and tone. Manufacture Date Note: The date printed on the tube crimp indicates the manufacture date, not the expiration date. Always refer to the product box for detailed information.   How Does Glyco 6 Cream Work?   Glyco 6 Cream works by increasing the turnover rate of epithelial cells, the cells that line the surface of the skin. This process encourages skin peeling and the treatment of comedones (small bumps caused by acne). The cream’s action also involves killing bacteria, reducing inflammation, and unplugging blocked pores. When applied, Glyco 6 Cream decomposes to release oxygen, which acts as a bactericidal agent against Propionibacterium acnes, the bacteria responsible for acne.   Uses of Glyco 6 Cream   Glyco 6 Cream is primarily used to treat:   Acne: Reduces acne by unclogging pores and preventing future breakouts. Melasma: Helps lighten the dark, discolored patches of skin that occur due to hormonal changes or sun exposure. Hyperpigmentation: Treats areas of the skin that have become darker than the surrounding skin. Wrinkles: Reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Photoaging: Treats premature aging of the skin caused by repeated UV exposure.   How to Use Glyco 6 Cream   Glyco 6 Cream is for external use only. To use it effectively, follow these steps: Cleanse Your Skin: Start with a clean face. Use a gentle cleanser to remove any dirt, oil, or makeup. Apply a Small Amount: Take a pea-sized amount of Glyco 6 Cream and apply it evenly on the affected areas. Avoid sensitive areas like the eyes, lips, and mouth. Massage Gently: Use your fingers to gently massage the cream into your skin until fully absorbed. Nighttime Routine: It’s best to apply Glyco 6 Cream at night since glycolic acid can increase your skin’s sensitivity to the sun. Use Sunscreen: Always follow up with a broad-spectrum sunscreen during the day to protect your skin from UV damage. Avoid Certain Products: Refrain from using products that contain large amounts of alcohol, such as astringents, shaving creams, or after-shave lotions.   Warnings  Do not use Glyco 6 Cream if you are allergic to any of its ingredients. Let your doctor know if you have contact dermatitis, liver, kidney, gastrointestinal, or heart diseases. Please inform your doctor if you are using any other medications, including vitamins, before starting Glyco 6 Cream. Glyco 6 Cream can make the skin more sensitive to the sunlight; hence always use sunscreen and protective clothing before you step outdoors. It is recommended to avoid tanning booths and sunlamps. Do not apply Glyco 6 Cream on irritated and sunburned skin. Care should be taken while using Glyco 6 Cream on sensitive areas, such as the neck. Let your doctor know if you are pregnant, planning to conceive, or are a breastfeeding mother.   Storage Instructions  Store Glyco 6 Cream in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Ensure that the lid is tightly closed after each use to maintain the cream’s efficacy.  If you do not notice any improvement after 4-6 weeks of using Glyco 6 Cream, consult your dermatologist for further advice.

The "Smooth" Effect: These ions neutralize the positive electrostatic charges that cause the hair cuticle to lift and create frizz and static. The "Shiny" Effect: By flattening the cuticle, the hair surface becomes perfectly smooth and flat. A smooth surface reflects light like a mirror, resulting in instant, noticeable shine. High-Quality Plate Material (Ceramic/Tourmaline): These materials are known for their ability to heat up quickly and distribute heat evenly across the entire plate surface. This avoids hot spots that can zap moisture and leave sections of hair looking dull and damaged. Even Heat: Consistent heat is crucial for a uniform smooth finish from root to tip. 3. Who Is It Best For? Individuals with Frizz-Prone Hair: This is the ideal user. If humidity or dryness makes your hair puff up, this straightener is designed to combat that. Those with Dull or Lackluster Hair: If your hair doesn't reflect much light and looks flat, the ionic technology will help restore its natural shine. People with Fine to Medium Hair Textures: This straightener will provide more than enough smoothing power for these hair types, delivering a glossy, salon-quality finish. Users who prioritize a sleek, polished look over volume or intense curl. 4. Potential Limitations May not be the most powerful option for very thick, coarse, or extremely curly hair that requires high heat to straighten. It can work, but may require more passes. Focuses on shine and smoothness rather than offering specialized features like wide plates for speed or fixed low heat for ultimate protection. Pros and Cons Summary Pros: Excellent frizz control for a smooth finish. Delivers high shine and a glossy look. Even heat distribution prevents damage and ensures consistent results. Versatile for straightening and creating waves. Adjustable temperature provides customization for different hair needs. Cons: Not a specialist tool for very thick hair or for absolute maximum heat protection. The shine-enhancing coating on plates (if present) may wear off over a long period. How it Compares to Other Philips Straighteners vs. StraightCare (BHS393 with OptimalTEMP): The StraightCare line focuses on health and damage prevention with fixed low heat. The ShinySmooth line focuses on aesthetic results (shine and smoothness) with adjustable heat. vs. Instantly Smoothes Untamable (BHS738): The BHS738 is about raw power and high heat to dominate thick hair. The BP8401 is about ionic technology and finish to create shine. vs. A basic model (like BP8321): The BP8401 likely has more advanced ionic output or a superior plate coating specifically tuned for its "ShinySmooth" promise, making it a premium choice within the category of adjustable irons. Verdict The Philips BP8401 ShinySmooth Hair Straightener is a results-focused styling tool designed for a luxurious finish. It is an excellent choice for anyone whose main frustrations are frizz and a lack of shine. If you want your hair to look noticeably smoother, sleeker, and glossier after styling, this straightener is engineered to deliver exactly that. It's perfect for everyday use on fine to medium hair textures and for anyone looking to achieve a polished, high-shine look without a professional salon price tag. Think of it as a tool for enhancing your hair's appearance and health through superior smoothness and light reflection

product_name: Philips BHD360 ThermoProtect DryCare Hair Dryer
product_description: Philips BHD360 ThermoProtect DryCare Hair Dryer. This model is a direct step-up from the BHD351 we discussed previously. It shares the core philosophy of gentle drying but adds a crucial feature aimed at improving hair health and finish: ion technology. Key Features at a Glance Model: Philips BHD360 ThermoProtect DryCare Target Audience: Those looking for an affordable dryer that reduces heat damage and fights frizz for smoother hair. Key Technologies: ThermoProtect: Constant, even heat to prevent damage. Ionic Technology: Releases negative ions to break down water droplets faster and reduce frizz. Power: 2100 Watts – strong and standard for efficient drying. Settings: 3 heat settings, 2 speed settings. (This is an upgrade from the BHD351). Cool Shot Button: Yes. Attachments: Concentrator nozzle included. Foldable Handle: Yes. Ion Technology: Yes. This is the key difference. Detailed Breakdown & Comparison to BHD351 1. The Major Upgrade: Ionic Technology This is the single most important difference between the BHD360 and the BHD351. What it does: The dryer emits negative ions. These ions break down the larger water molecules on your hair into smaller droplets, allowing them to evaporate faster. More importantly, they neutralize the positive electrostatic charges that cause the hair cuticle to fray and create frizz. The Result: Faster drying time and smoother, shinier, less frizzy hair compared to a non-ionic dryer like the BHD351. 2. Design and Build Very similar to the BHD351. It maintains a simple, lightweight, and ergonomic design with a durable plastic body. The foldable handle is retained, making it just as portable and easy to store. It includes the same magnetic concentrator nozzle for focused styling. 3. Performance and Settings 2100W Motor: Identical power to the BHD351, so drying performance is similar in terms of airflow strength. ThermoProtect Technology: Same reliable, consistent heat technology to prevent damage. Settings (3 Heat / 2 Speed): This is an ergonomic upgrade. Heat Settings: Low - Medium - High. The addition of a medium setting is significant. It provides more control, allowing you to find a perfect warm setting that is effective for drying but gentler than the full high heat. This is great for styling or for those with sensitive scalps. Speed Settings: Low - High. Standard for control over airflow force. Cool Shot Button: Standard for setting your style. 4. Who Is It Best For? Frizz-Prone Hair Types: This is the ideal user. If you have wavy, curly, or thick hair that tends to get puffy or frizzy, the ionic technology is a game-changer. Anyone Wanting a Smoother Finish: If you air-dry and get frizz, or if your current basic dryer leaves your hair unruly, this will provide a noticeable improvement. Value-Seekers Who Want More Features: For a very small price increase over the BHD351, you get both heat protection and frizz reduction. People who want more heat control thanks to the 3rd (Medium) setting. Pros and Cons Summary Pros: Excellent value with two key technologies (ThermoProtect + Ionic). Effectively reduces frizz and increases shine compared to non-ionic dryers. Helps dry hair faster due to ionic technology. 3 heat settings offer greater control and versatility. Maintains all the good points: foldable, lightweight, includes nozzle. Cons: Still not the most powerful dryer on the market (though ample for most). It's a basic ionic dryer; it doesn't have advanced features of premium models (e.g., multiple ion generators, cold shot for volume, specific curling attachments). As with most dryers in this category, it can be somewhat loud. BHD351 vs. BHD360: Which One Should You Choose? This is the key question. Here’s a simple decision guide: Choose the Philips BHD351 if: Your budget is absolutely minimal. Your hair is naturally straight, fine, or not very frizzy. Your only requirement is to dry your hair quickly and with less heat damage. You are not concerned about frizz or achieving a super-smooth blowout. Choose the Philips BHD360 if: You can spend a little more for a significant upgrade. Your hair is wavy, curly, thick, or prone to frizz and puffiness. You want a smoother, shinier finish from your blow dryer. You appreciate the extra control of a third (Medium) heat setting. Verdict The Philips BHD360 is a stellar budget-friendly hair dryer that successfully combines two of the most desired technologies: heat protection and frizz reduction. For most people, the BHD360 is the unequivocally better choice over the BHD351. The benefits of ionic technology for smoothness and shine are tangible, and the extra heat setting adds welcome versatility. Unless you are on an extremely tight budget and have perfectly straight, non-frizzy hair, the BHD360 offers far better overall results for a very minimal price difference.

product_name: Philips BHS377 ThermoProtect StraightCare Straightener
product_description: Philips BHS377 ThermoProtect StraightCare Straightener. This model name is very telling. It combines the "StraightCare" name with the "ThermoProtect" branding, indicating it's a part of Philips's lineup focused on heat protection and hair health. Based on Philips's standard product families, the BHS377 is almost certainly another variant that features the core OptimalTEMP technology, similar to the BHS375 and BHS376. The name emphasizes its protective nature. Key Features at a Glance Model: Philips BHS377 ThermoProtect StraightCare Defining Technology: OptimalTEMP Technology (This is the hallmark of the StraightCare series and the reason for the "ThermoProtect" name). Temperature: Fixed at 185°C (365°F). This is the heart of its protective design. Plate Material: Ceramic-coated for smooth gliding and even heat distribution. Heat Up Time: Very fast, typically around 30 seconds. Special Features: Swivel cord, automatic safety shut-off (usually after 60 minutes). Detailed Breakdown 1. Design and Usability Ergonomics: Designed to be comfortable to hold, with an intuitive grip that allows for easy maneuvering when creating both straight styles and waves. Plates: Feature rounded edges. This design is crucial as it allows you to glide the iron through your hair without snagging and also lets you curl and wave your hair without creating harsh, angular kinks. Swivel Cord: A vital feature that prevents the cord from tangling as you turn the iron, making the styling process much smoother and safer. Controls: Deliberately simple. You will likely find a single on/off button and a ready-to-use indicator light. The absence of a temperature dial is a key feature, not a missing function. 2. Performance and Technology: OptimalTEMP with ThermoProtect This is the entire purpose of this straightener. The "ThermoProtect" name directly refers to the outcome of the OptimalTEMP technology. The Science of 185°C: Hair is made of keratin, held together by bonds. High heat (above 185°C) breaks the strong disulfide bonds, causing permanent damage, protein loss, and that familiar "fried hair" smell. OptimalTEMP works at precisely 185°C, which is hot enough to break only the temporary hydrogen bonds that allow for styling, without causing that severe structural damage. How to Use It: The technique is different from a conventional iron. For fine, damaged, or color-treated hair: It will style effectively in just one pass, offering immense protection. For thick, coarse, or curly hair: You gently glide the iron over the same section 2 to 4 times. The heat builds up gradually to style the hair without ever exposing it to damagingly high temperatures. The "ThermoProtect" Result: You get the style you want with dramatically reduced risk of split ends, breakage, dryness, and color fading. Your hair retains its shine and strength. 3. Who Is It Best For? Damage-Conscious Users: The primary audience. If you've ever seen heat damage on your ends, this straightener is for you. People with Bleached, Highlighted, or Chemically Treated Hair: This iron is designed to be gentle on compromised hair. Individuals with Fine or Thin Hair: High-heat irons can easily overwhelm and damage fine hair. This provides a much safer alternative. Anyone Who Styles Regularly: If you use a straightener frequently, the cumulative damage from a high-heat iron is significant. The BHS377 mitigates this entirely. Those who value simplicity: No more guessing what temperature to use. 4. Who Might Prefer a Different Model? Users with Extremely Thick, Resistant Curly Hair who are unwilling to make multiple passes and prioritize speed over hair health. Professional Stylists who need adjustable temperatures for maximum speed with a diverse clientele. Anyone who explicitly wants high heat for specific techniques (though this is not recommended for daily use). Pros and Cons Summary Pros: Unmatched Heat Protection: OptimalTEMP technology is clinically proven to reduce hair damage. Foolproof and Simple: No confusing settings; just turn it on and style. Universal Compatibility: Works on all hair types by adjusting the number of passes. Promotes Long-Term Hair Health: Less damage means your hair can grow longer and healthier without being cut off due to breakage. Fast heat-up time and swivel cord for convenience. Cons: Not adjustable. This is a core part of its design but may be seen as a limitation by users who want manual control. Requires patience for very thick hair, as it needs more passes than a high-heat iron. How it Compares to Other Philips Straighteners BHS377 vs. BHS336 ("Instant Shine"): The BHS336 is a traditional adjustable iron focused on adding shine after styling with ions. The BHS377 is focused on preventing damage during the styling process. BHS377 vs. BHS375/BHS376: These are all part of the OptimalTEMP "StraightCare" family. The model numbers (BHS375, BHS376, BHS377) often indicate minor variations like color, included accessories (e.g., a heat-resistant pouch), or being destined for different regions. Their core technology and performance are identical. Verdict The Philips BHS377 ThermoProtect StraightCare Straightener is a health-first styling tool. It is highly recommended for anyone who wants to achieve sleek, straight styles or beautiful waves without sacrificing the integrity of their hair. It is particularly ideal for those with damaged, color-treated, or fine hair. If your goal is to have beautifully styled hair that also remains healthy and strong over time, this straightener is an excellent choice. It represents a smarter, more caring approach to heat styling.

As you glide the straightener over your hair, the heat helps to infuse this keratin onto the hair's surface. The Result: Smoothing: Helps to smooth down the hair cuticle, sealing gaps and cracks. Frizz Control: A smoothed cuticle resists humidity better, reducing frizz. Shine: A smooth, sealed cuticle reflects light more effectively, resulting in instant shine. Strength: Can help to temporarily patch and strengthen damaged areas of the hair shaft. In short, Kerashine aims to provide a conditioning treatment while you style, helping to combat the damage that heat styling can cause. 3. Who Is It Best For? product_name: Philips BHS393 StraightCare Straightener
product_description: Philips BHS393 StraightCare Straightener. This model is a significant and premium entry in Philips's lineup. While it shares the "StraightCare" name, indicating a focus on hair health, the BHS393 often represents a more advanced or specialized version, typically featuring wider plates and sometimes additional technologies. Key Features at a Glance Model: Philips BHS393 StraightCare Straightener Defining Technology: OptimalTEMP Technology (constant, protective 185°C heat) is almost certainly included. Key Differentiator: Extra-wide plates – typically 50mm (2 inches) wide. Plate Material: Advanced ceramic coating for even heat distribution and smooth glide. Temperature: Fixed at the optimal 185°C (365°F). Heat Up Time: Very fast (approx. 30 seconds). Special Features: Swivel cord, automatic safety shut-off, often includes a heat-resistant travel pouch. Detailed Breakdown 1. Design and Usability: The Power of Wide Plates 50mm Plates: This is the most significant feature of the BHS393. The plates are much wider than those on a standard straightener (which are usually 25mm-33mm). Why Wide Plates Matter: Speed: You can straighten much larger sections of hair at once. This is a game-changer for people with long, thick, or very dense hair, drastically cutting down styling time. Versatility: The wide surface area is excellent for creating soft, loose, beachy waves and adding volume to the roots. It's less ideal for creating very tight, precise curls. Smoothing: Excellent for quickly smoothing out the overall surface of the hair for a sleek, salon-like blowout look. Ergonomics & Swivel Cord: Designed for comfort during use, with a swivel cord to prevent tangling. 2. Performance and Technology: OptimalTEMP for Health The BHS393 combines the efficiency of wide plates with the health benefits of the StraightCare philosophy. OptimalTEMP Technology: Like its siblings (BHS375, BHS376, BHS377), it operates at a constant 185°C. This temperature is scientifically chosen to style hair effectively without causing the severe damage associated with high heat (230°C+). The Technique: The technique remains the same: use more passes on thicker sections, fewer on finer ones. The wide plates just mean each "pass" covers a much larger area. Result: You get the speed and efficiency of a professional-wide iron combined with the gentle, damage-limiting care of OptimalTEMP technology. Your hair gets styled quickly and healthily. 3. Who Is It Best For? People with Long, Thick, or Coarse Hair: This is the ideal user. The 50mm plates are designed to tackle your hair type efficiently. Anyone Who Wants to Save Time: If you dread how long it takes to style your hair, the wider plates will significantly speed up the process. Those Who Prefer Loose Waves and Voluminous Styles: The wide plates are perfect for creating these looks. Damage-Conscious Users with Abundant Hair: You don't have to choose between health and practicality; this iron offers both. 4. Who Might Prefer a Different Model? People with Very Short Hair or Pixie Cuts: The wide plates can be cumbersome and difficult to maneuver around short layers and precise sections. Those who want to create very tight, defined curls or precise, sharp styles: A narrower plate (25mm-30mm) offers much more control for these techniques. Users with exclusively fine, thin hair: The wide plates may be overkill, and a standard width might offer more than enough capacity and better control. Pros and Cons Summary Pros: Ideal for thick and long hair; drastically reduces styling time. OptimalTEMP technology protects hair from extreme heat damage. Perfect for creating loose waves and adding volume. Smooths hair quickly for a sleek finish. All the benefits of the StraightCare line (even heat, swivel cord, safety shut-off). Cons: Too large for short hair or very precise styling. Not the best tool for creating tight curls. As with all OptimalTEMP irons, it requires multiple passes on the most resistant hair types. BHS393 vs. Other Philips StraightCare Straighteners Feature Philips BHS393 (Wide) Philips BHS375/376/377 (Standard) Plate Width 50mm (2 inches) ~33mm (1.3 inches) Best For Long, Thick, Coarse Hair All hair types, especially fine/medium Primary Advantage Speed & Efficiency Versatility & Precision Ideal Style Loose waves, quick straightening All styles, including tighter curls Verdict The Philips BHS393 StraightCare Straightener is a specialist tool for a specific need. It is not a one-size-fits-all straightener. Instead, it is the perfect solution for anyone with long, thick, or abundant hair who is serious about reducing heat damage. If you have always needed to use high-heat irons to manage your hair and have suffered the damage that comes with it, the BHS393 is designed for you. It combines the time-saving power of extra-wide plates with the hair-preserving science of OptimalTEMP technology. It's an excellent investment for those who want health and efficiency in one package.

Below is a summary of noteworthy ones (based on ingredient analysis sources): Ingredient Role / Function Glycolic Acid The main actives that penetrate the hair fiber, help fill gaps in porous hair, smooth the surface, and enhance shine Cetearyl Alcohol A fatty alcohol used as an emollient (softens hair) and helps thicken / stabilize the formula Behentrimonium Chloride A conditioning / antistatic / preservative agent Amodimethicone A silicone-based conditioning polymer that forms a light, smooth film on hair to aid manageability Trideceth-6 An emulsifier / surfactant agent to help mix oil and water components Cetrimonium Chloride Conditioning / antistatic / preservative function Potassium Hydroxide pH adjuster / buffering agent Fragrance / Parfum For scent (contains typical fragrance ingredients such as limonene, linalool, etc.) Colorants / Pigments Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Red 33 (CI 17200), Yellow 5 (CI 19140), Mica — for visual appearance From ingredient decoders, the full list starts with: Aqua / Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Amodimethicone, CI 77891 / Titanium Dioxide, CI 17200 / Red 33, CI 19140 / Yellow 5, Mica, Hydroxycitronellal, Phenoxyethanol, Trideceth-6, Limonene, Benzoic Acid, Linalool, Isopropyl Alcohol, Potassium Hydroxide, Cetrimonium Chloride, Hexyl Cinnamal, Glycolic Acid, Parfum / Fragrance Claims & Benefits Enhances hair shine / gloss by smoothing surface irregularities Helps seal cuticles (reducing light scattering, making hair reflective) Reduces frizz and improves manageability Lightweight enough so it doesn’t weigh hair down too much Suitable for various hair types Works best as part of the “Glycolic Gloss” hair routine (shampoo + conditioner + treatments) Retailers commonly list these claimed benefits (for 360 ml variant): revitalizing dull hair, glossy finish, smoothness, nourishing hair from within, sealing fibers, controlling frizz (even in humid environments)  Usage Instructions Use after shampoo (preferably the matching Glycolic Gloss Shampoo). Apply the conditioner from mid-lengths to ends (less toward scalp if oily). Leave on for a few minutes (commonly around 2–3 minutes) before rinsing. Can be used regularly (every wash) as part of your hair regimen. Some sources mention leave-on time as “3 minutes.” Things to Consider / Limitations Because it contains acidic ingredient (glycolic acid), some users with sensitive scalps may experience irritation — patch testing is advised. Fragrance and certain fragrance components (limonene, linalool) are in the formula, which can be potential allergens for sensitive individuals. The gloss / smoothing effect is not necessarily permanent — frequent washes or harsh shampoos may reduce effect over time. On very fine hair, a heavy application may weigh hair down — use sparingly. Always check the actual product packaging’s ingredient list (INCI) in your region, as formulations may vary.

Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E): An antioxidant that helps to protect the skin from environmental stressors and supports skin health. Caffeine: Helps to constrict blood vessels, reducing the appearance of puffiness and dark circles. Peucedanum Graveolens (Dill) Extract: Known for its skin-conditioning properties.  Dimethicone: A silicone that forms a barrier on the skin, preventing moisture loss. Cyclopentasiloxane: A silicone that provides a smooth application and helps to disperse other ingredients evenly. Glycerin: A humectant that draws moisture into the skin, keeping it hydrated. Pentylene Glycol: A solvent and moisturizer that enhances the penetration of other ingredients. Acetyl Glucosamine: A skin-identical ingredient that supports skin hydration and barrier function. Titanium Dioxide: A mineral sunscreen agent that provides broad-spectrum UV protection. Dimethicone Crosspolymer: A thickening agent that gives the product its desired consistency. Carbomer: A thickening agent that helps control the viscosity of the product. Triethanolamine: A pH adjuster that ensures the product maintains its effectiveness. Phenoxyethanol: A preservative that prevents microbial growth. Caprylyl Glycol: A skin-conditioning agent that also serves as a preservative. Disodium EDTA: A chelating agent that binds metal ions, enhancing the stability of the formulation. Mica: A mineral that adds a subtle shimmer and enhances the product's appearance. Additional Features Precision Micro-Rollers: The applicator features cooling metal balls that massage the product into the skin, helping to reduce puffiness and improve circulation. Dermatologically Tested: The product has been tested for skin compatibility, making it suitable for sensitive skin. Non-Comedogenic: Formulated to not clog pores, reducing the risk of breakouts. Free from Harsh Chemicals: The formula is free from parabens, phthalates, and dyes, reducing the potential for skin irritation. Usage Instructions Apply: Gently roll the applicator under the eyes in a semicircular motion. Massage: Use your ring finger to gently tap the product into the skin, enhancing absorption. Frequency: Use daily, preferably in the morning, to reduce puffiness and refresh the eye area.

product_name: Bobcare(Rowghan Zeenat) 20gm
product_description: Bobcare (Rowghan Zeenat) Ointment 20gm  Bobcare (Rowghan Zeenat) Ointment 20gm একটি ইউনানী হারবাল অয়েন্টমেন্ট, যা কার্যকরী ভেষজ উপাদানের সমন্বয়ে প্রস্তুত। এটি বিশেষভাবে স্তন ঝুলে পড়া (Breast sagging/ptosis) সমস্যায় বাহ্যিকভাবে ব্যবহারের জন্য নির্দেশিত। নিয়মিত ও সঠিকভাবে ব্যবহার করলে ত্বকের দৃঢ়তা বজায় রাখতে এবং অংশটির টানটানভাব ধরে রাখতে সহায়ক হতে পারে। পণ্যের বৈশিষ্ট্য ইউনানী হারবাল ফর্মুলা শুধুমাত্র বাহ্যিক ব্যবহারের জন্য স্তন ঝুলে পড়া সমস্যায় ব্যবহারের উদ্দেশ্যে প্রস্তুত ২০ গ্রাম লেমিনেটেড টিউব প্যাক বিবরণ ববকেয়ার অয়েন্টমেন্ট ভেষজ নির্যাস ও তেলের সমন্বয়ে তৈরি একটি ইউনানী প্রস্তুতি। এতে ব্যবহৃত ডালিমজাতীয় উপাদান এবং জলপাই তেল ইউনানী ফর্মুলেশন অনুযায়ী ত্বকের যত্নে সহায়ক হিসেবে ব্যবহৃত হয়। নির্ধারিত নিয়মে প্রয়োগ করলে স্তন ঝুলে পড়া সমস্যায় উপকার পেতে পারেন। উপাদান (Composition) প্রতি ০১ গ্রাম অয়েন্টমেন্টে সক্রিয় উপাদান রয়েছে (নির্যাস আকারে): ডালিমের ফুল (Punica granatum) – ০১ গ্রাম ডালিম গাছের পাতা (Punica granatum) – ০১ গ্রাম ডালিম গাছের ছাল (Punica granatum) – ০১ গ্রাম কাঁচা ডালিম (Punica granatum) – ০১ গ্রাম জলপাই তেল (Olea europaea) – ০১ মিলি সূত্র: রওগন জীনাত, বা.জা.ই.ফ রোগ নির্দেশনা (Indication) স্তন ঝুলে পড়া মাত্রা ও ব্যবহারবিধি (Dosage & Directions) প্রয়োজনমতো শুধুমাত্র বাহ্যিকভাবে আক্রান্ত স্থানে ব্যবহার করুন দিনে ১–২ বার অথবা চিকিৎসকের পরামর্শ অনুযায়ী ব্যবহার্য ব্যবহার শেষে হাত ধুয়ে ফেলুন চোখ/মুখ/কাটা স্থানে লাগাবেন না পার্শ্ব-প্রতিক্রিয়া (Side Effects) প্রদত্ত তথ্য অনুযায়ী কোন পার্শ্ব প্রতিক্রিয়া বা অন্য ঔষধের সাথে মিশ্র প্রতিক্রিয়া পরিলক্ষিত হয় না। বিরূপ প্রতিক্রিয়া ইউনানী ঔষধ রওগন জীনাত-এ তেমন কোন বিরূপ প্রতিক্রিয়া জানা যায়নি। গর্ভাবস্থা ও স্তন্যদানকালীন ব্যবহার গর্ভবতী ও স্তন্যদানকালীন সময়ে ববকেয়ার অয়েন্টমেন্ট ব্যবহার করা থেকে বিরত থাকা উচিত। সংরক্ষণ আলো থেকে দূরে, ঠান্ডা ও শুষ্ক স্থানে রাখুন শিশুদের নাগালের বাইরে রাখুন

product_name: Senora Belt Sanitary Napkin 4 Pads (Buy 1 & Get 1 Pads Free)
product_description: Senora Belt Sanitary Napkin 4 Pads (Buy 1 & Get 1 Pads Free)  Senora Belt Sanitary Napkin is a belt-system sanitary pad designed for menstrual protection. Instead of sticking directly to underwear, it attaches to an elastic belt that holds the pad securely in place. It’s produced by Square Toiletries Ltd, a well-known Bangladeshi personal care brand. The “Buy 1 Get 1 Free” means that when you buy one pack (for example, 4 pads), you receive another pack or set of pads free — a promotional offer. Composition & Structure Each pad is made of multiple protective layers for hygiene and comfort: Top sheet: Soft non-woven fabric for comfort and dryness. Absorbent core: Sterilized cellulose pulp with super absorbent polymer (SAP) that locks in moisture. Distribution layer: Spreads the menstrual flow evenly across the pad. Back sheet: Leak-proof PE film that prevents staining. Hot-melt adhesive: Used for structural bonding. Elastic belt: Made from flexible material that holds the pad in position. The pad usually has 8 layers for maximum absorbency and contains an anti-infection formula to maintain hygiene and prevent irritation. Key Features Designed for secure fit and no leakage with belt system. High absorbency and dry-feel surface. Soft, breathable outer cover for long-hour comfort. Helps maintain cleanliness and freshness during periods. Ideal for moderate to heavy flow. Each pad is individually wrapped for hygiene. How to Use (Step-by-Step) Preparation Wash your hands properly before handling the napkin. Take out a fresh pad from the wrapper. Make sure your elastic belt is clean and ready to use. Wearing the Pad Unfold the pad carefully. You’ll find two loops or ends on the pad meant to attach to the belt. Lock or tie the two sides of the pad if required (some models have foldable flaps). Attach the pad to the elastic belt by inserting the loops of the belt into the hooks/holes on the pad. Ensure the light pink plastic shield faces downward and the soft side faces your body. Put on the belt around your waist so that the pad sits snugly between your legs. Adjust the position so the pad is centered and comfortable. During Use The pad should feel snug, not tight. If it feels loose, re-adjust the belt. Change the pad every 4–6 hours, or sooner if it becomes saturated. Removal & Disposal Unhook the pad from the belt. Roll it up from front to back. Wrap it in tissue or the original wrapper. Dispose of in a waste bin — never flush it down the toilet. Wash hands thoroughly after disposal. Hygiene & Storage Always change your pad every 4–6 hours to prevent infection or odor. Store pads in a cool, dry place, away from humidity. Keep them sealed until use to maintain sterility. Do not reuse disposable pads. Wash and dry the belt after each use if it’s reusable. Choosing the Right Variant Senora offers different pad types — Belt System (Regular), Heavy Flow, and XL. Choose based on: Flow level: Light, medium, or heavy. Day or night use: Night versions are usually longer and more absorbent. Comfort preference: Belt system offers more security during movement. Benefits ✅ Comfortable fit with adjustable belt ✅ Excellent absorbency ✅ Soft material prevents rashes ✅ Leak-proof protection ✅ Hygienic and easy to use ✅ Economical pack with Buy 1 Get 1 Free offer Precautions Do not wear a single pad for more than 6 hours. Avoid contact of pad adhesive or plastic with skin for long periods. If you experience itching, burning, or rashes, discontinue use and consult a doctor. Dispose of properly — do not burn or flush. Keep away from children. Environmental & Health Notes Used sanitary pads should be wrapped properly before disposal to prevent contamination. Avoid dumping them in open areas. Many brands now promote biodegradable sanitary disposal bags — using those is a cleaner option. If you prefer eco-friendly options, Senora also has “Cotton Feel” and “Eco” variants.
